notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. reaches on a fielder's choice. Ramón Laureano to 2nd. Ramón Laureano advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar.

notableEvents.label: Brenton Doyle pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brenton Doyle grounds out, pitcher Adrian Morejon to first baseman Ty France.

notableEvents.label: Brenton Doyle pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brenton Doyle singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Ramón Laureano.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Brenton Doyle out at 2nd. Edouard Julien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Troy Johnston out at 2nd. Ezequiel Tovar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jake Cronenworth steals (1) 2nd base. Jake Cronenworth to 3rd. Jake Cronenworth advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Brett Sullivan.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds out to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Xander Bogaerts scores. Bryce Johnson scores.
